Business Banking /
Business Credit Cards /
Spend Management

INTRODUCING U.S. BANK SPEND MANAGEMENT

Monitor and manage your business spend, all in one place.

Experience a game-changing platform that allows you to stay in control of your card spending, now available exclusively with all U.S. Bank business credit cards.

Log in to your account

Save time with a comprehensive suite of core capabilities.

Integrated accounting

Simplify with direct accounting integration and spend history exports.

Intuitive receipt capture

Get transaction tagging and one-tap receipt upload.

Robust card controls

Turn cards on/off, set spend limits, choose spend categories, restrict transaction days/types and more.

Proactive user management

Easily create and update roles, users and permissions for key users and employees.

Real-time analytics

Make informed decisions with custom reporting and dashboards.

Mobile app

Access the full power of our platform in your pocket.

Log in to your account

Smarter business spending starts with a great credit card.

U.S. Bank Spend Management comes exclusively with all U.S. Bank business credit cards. Take the first step towards more control and visibility over your business expenses and apply for a business card today.

Apply now

Upgrade your account with Spend Management Pro Plus.

Designed to meet the varying needs of businesses, Spend Management Pro Plus offers subscription-based capabilities to streamline complex spending. Start Spend Management Pro Plus today to access free for 6 months.

Features & specifications

Pro

Pro Plus

Price

Free

$79/month
$799/annually

Create physical and virtual employee and utility cards

Control how, where and when users can spend

Set role-based permissions

Integrate with QuickBooks Online, QuickBooks Desktop and Xero

Access dashboard for real-time expense tracking

Upload and auto-match receipts to transactions

View spend analytics

Integrate with Sage Intacct

Create departments and department leads

Upload, update and manage users in bulk

Set custom rules to categorize transactions

Create expense policies

Allow users to request changes to card controls

Disclosures

U.S. Bank may change APRs, fees and other account terms in the future based on your experience with U.S. Bank National Association and its affiliates as provided under the Cardmember Agreement and applicable law.

The creditor and issuer of this card is U.S. Bank National Association, pursuant to a license from Visa U.S.A. Inc.
